title: [3.13] gh-133441: Fix STORE_ATTR_WITH_HINT bytecode
author: vstinner
body:
Deoptimize if the dict is a dict subclass.

comments.author: ZeroIntensity
comments.body: It looks like the offending code is on main as well.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> It looks like the offending code is on main as well.

I failed to write code to trigger the bug on main, so I'm not sure that main is affected.

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body: @Fidget-Spinner: Do you think that the main branch is also affected? I'm unable to trigger the bug in the main branch, but the code looks the same. I would prefer to not deoptimize just for an hypothetical case if it cannot occur in practice. The code in the main branch is a little bit different.

comments.author: Fidget-Spinner
comments.body: @vstinner did you try wrapping the repro in a loop? Sometimes that might trigger it. I mean an actual Python for loop, not `python -m test -F`

comments.author: vstinner
comments.body:
> @vstinner did you try wrapping the repro in a loop? Sometimes that might trigger it. I mean an actual Python for loop, not python -m test -F

I just tried to put the reproducer in a loop: I still cannot reproduce the failure on the main branch.
